column1: He is not the _____ boy in our group. He is as _____ as you are. (tall, tall)
The _____ dinosaur egg found so far belonged to a long-necked dinosaur called Hypselosaurus. (big)
Sirius is about twice as _____ as our Sun. (big)
The Arctic Ocean is the _____ of the oceans. (cold)
Which is _____ : the mosquito or the scorpion? (poisonous)
